title: Bitcoin analysts predict $300,000–$500,000 price in 2029. The math says no
summary: Analysts predict a rally to $300,000 or more by 2029. But key data suggests the era of moonshots may be over.

title: Meta's Chief Data Officer Says Agentic Commerce is the "Next Tier of Business"
summary: Alex Schultz says stablecoins are assumed inside Meta. The harder problem is getting the rest of the world there.

title: U.S. government digital dollar set to be banned tonight under housing law's CBDC limit
summary: Despite President Donald Trump's refusal to sign Congress' bipartisan housing bill, it's set to go into effect at midnight, and its temporary CBDC ban along with it.

title: Hyundai becomes first major South Korean company to introduce internal stablecoin transfers
summary: The initiative builds on a broader shift by companies exploring stablecoins to move money between international operations more efficiently.

title: OKX, MetaMask, Matter Labs back dispute resolution court for AI agents
summary: The Genlayer Foundation is leading the 27-firm consortium that makes AI-based payments, escrow and dispute resolution interoperable.
